pages.title: Pricing
pages.summary: WhatsApp Business API Pricing in India for AiSensy Platform. Starts at ₹1500/month. Affordable Pricing for the Best WhatsApp Marketing Platform in India
pages.content:
AiSensy WhatsApp Business API pricing (India). Plans, all with unlimited team members: Free Forever (₹0); Basic ₹1,500/month; Pro ₹3,200/month (most popular); Premium ₹9,100/month; Unlimited ₹45,000/month; Enterprise is custom-priced. There is NO setup fee and AiSensy does not charge to procure the WhatsApp Business API. Meta's per-message template charges are billed separately on top: Marketing ₹1.09, Utility and Authentication ₹0.145, and Service messages are free within the 24-hour customer service window. Pro adds over Basic: campaign scheduling, click tracking, budget & analytics, and project APIs. AI Chatbots & AI Agents are add-ons (Basic ₹2,500/month, Pro+AI ₹3,500/month). A 14-day free trial is available. 
Monthly
Quarterly
SAVE 5%
Yearly
SAVE 10%
Compare Plans
All billing is pre-paid. WhatsApp Conversation Credits are recharged & managed separately (Marketing ₹1.09, Utility & Authentication ₹0.145 per message for Indian users; Service conversations are always free).
 Need help choosing?
Talk to our team →

Free Forever plan is shown in the cards. "Unlimited" limits follow AiSensy's fair-use policy (Agents up to 200, Tags up to 500, Attributes up to 100). Enterprise limits are tailored to your scale.

Customer Service Window
When a user sends you a message, a 24-hour support window begins. Each new message from the user resets this window. During this window, you can respond freely without additional charges and you can respond with any free form messages. Also, utility templates delivered within this window won't be charged.
Unlimited Free Service messages
Each business using AiSensy receives Unlimited FREE service messages. Businesses can reply to user messages without incurring any

pages.title: Shopify
pages.summary: Seamlessly connect your Shopify app with AiSensy and automate notifications for order, delivery, feedback & more on WhatsApp!
pages.content:
Start for FREE
Book a Demo
Recover Abandoned Carts
Automate personalized WhatsApp reminders to customers who left items in their cart to complete their purchase.
Order Confirmation & Updates
Provide instant order confirmations, shipping updates, and delivery notifications via WhatsApp
Reduce RTO (Return to Origin)
Confirm COD orders and cut down on returns with WhatsApp notifications.
Feedback Collection & Reviews
Gather valuable insights to improve your products and services.
Timely Reorder Reminders
Boost repeat purchases by proactively reminding customers to restock their favorite products.
Promotional Campaigns & Offers
Launch promotions, send offers, and drive engagement directly through WhatsApp.
Copy Your Shopify App Token
• In your AiSensy app, go to Ecomm+ -> Shopify Store Setup.
• Tap Copy Shopify App token (you'll need this in a bit).
• Now tap Install app.
Head to the Shopify App Store
• Clicking the Install app button will take you straight to the AiSensy app in the Shopify App Store.
• Tap the Install button there.
Confirm the installation
On the next screen, tap Install again to confirm.
Pay a Small Setup Fee
Complete the one-time payment of $1 to proceed.
(If you prefer not to pay, check out the steps to connect manually at the link provided below)
.
Paste the token into AiSensy and Connect
Return to the AiSensy app, paste the Shopify token you copied and click Connect.
In AiSensy app, refresh your screen and voila! Magic Done!
Your Shopify store is now connected to AiSensy in just a few simple steps.
Note: If you don't wish to spend the $1 setup fee, follow the steps in the link below.
How to Manually Connect your Shopify Store
